metadata.description: Grid mapping of physical combat armor sets, progressing from dense matter constraints to pure consciousness manifestation. Mapped Row by Row based on the central item cluster.

2.name: Null-Space Cape
2.description: Woven from the void; absorbs kinetic impacts directly into zero-point energy.

3.name: Deep Ether Cape
3.description: Conducts the pure fluid consciousness of the Reality, allowing frictionless movement.

4.name: Astral Mantle
4.description: Forged in the astral plane, granting the wearer sovereignty over localized gravity.

5.name: Resonance Cape
5.description: Etched with ancient circuitry vibrating at the frequency of absolute truth.

6.name: Ancient Tech Cape
6.description: Channels pure intent into a physical defense barrier.

7.name: Prismatic 'I AM' Cape
7.description: The ultimate manifestation of presence; radiates infinite experiential power.

2.name: Null-Space Great Helm
2.description: A dense void-metal helm that completely silences background physical noise.

3.name: Deep Ether Great Helm
3.description: Filters visual input to highlight etheric signatures and life-force.

4.name: Astral Great Helm
4.description: Enhances the wearer's innate remote viewing during physical combat.

5.name: Resonance Great Helm
5.description: A technological relic that nullifies Dark Order propaganda and veils.

6.name: Ancient Tech Great Helm
6.description: Features integrated zero-point HUD for absolute spatial awareness.

7.name: Prismatic 'I AM' Helm
7.description: A crown of total knowing; physical attacks are perceived before they manifest.

1.name: Dense Matter Helm
1.description: Unawakened iron; heavy and limited to purely physical protection.

2.name: Null-Space Helm
2.description: Lightweight void-metal offering unhindered perceptual clarity.

3.name: Deep Ether Helm
3.description: A streamlined visor tuned to the flow of local ether.

4.name: Astral Helm
4.description: Open-faced design to allow unobstructed projection of intent.

5.name: Resonance Helm
5.description: Conductive headgear that aligns the wearer's frequency with the server.

6.name: Ancient Tech Helm
6.description: Advanced alloys that strengthen the wearer's psychic projection.

7.name: Prismatic Med Helm
7.description: Flawless crystalline armor reflecting the pure truth of the creator.

1.name: Dense Matter Plate
1.description: Standard physical plating; unaware and subject to heavy gravity.

2.name: Null-Space Plate
2.description: Swirling void energy that actively negates physical mass.

3.name: Deep Ether Plate
3.description: Saturated with God's Blood, granting immense vitality regeneration.

4.name: Astral Plate
4.description: Embedded with star-forged gold to conduct immense manifestation energy.

5.name: Resonance Plate
5.description: Emits a localized frequency field that physically repels ignorant attacks.

6.name: Ancient Tech Plate
6.description: Powered by a central zero-point core, rendering the wearer practically weightless.

7.name: Prismatic 'I AM' Plate
7.description: Invincible experiential armor; it exists perfectly because you know it exists.

2.name: Null-Space Legs
2.description: Greaves that anchor the wearer to the void rather than the earth.

3.name: Deep Ether Legs
3.description: Fluid movement plating that ignores fluid dynamics and physical drag.

4.name: Astral Legs
4.description: Allows the wearer to stand firm against extreme psychic kinetic forces.

5.name: Resonance Legs
5.description: Circuit-lined armor that grounds erratic enemy thought-forms harmlessly.

6.name: Ancient Tech Legs
6.description: Utilizes localized anti-gravity to reduce fatigue to absolute zero.

7.name: Prismatic 'I AM' Legs
7.description: Pure manifestation; ensures the wearer's stance cannot be broken.

2.name: Null-Space Boots
2.description: Heavy void-metal boots for completely halting physical momentum.

3.name: Deep Ether Boots
3.description: Boots that leave no physical footprint, only an etheric trace.

4.name: Astral Boots
4.description: Allows the wearer to walk upon localized anti-gravity fields.

5.name: Resonance Boots
5.description: Each step emits a pulse of truth that shatters weak physical constructs.

6.name: Ancient Tech Boots
6.description: Zero-point thrusters integrated directly into the sole for instantaneous movement.

7.name: Prismatic 'I AM' Boots
7.description: Treads that move the Reality around the wearer rather than moving the wearer.

2.name: Null-Space Gauntlets
2.description: Allows the user to grip and manipulate dark matter directly.

3.name: Deep Ether Gauntlets
3.description: Enhances the tactile transmission of psychic injections.

4.name: Astral Gauntlets
4.description: Gold-lined gloves that perfectly channel the power of manifestation.

5.name: Resonance Gauntlets
5.description: Vibrating gauntlets that can phase through unawakened physical armor.

6.name: Ancient Tech Gauntlets
6.description: Amplifies physical strength infinitely through zero-point energy systems.

7.name: Prismatic 'I AM' Gauntlets
7.description: The hands of the creator; shapes reality with absolute, unquestionable authority.

3.name: Deep Ether Treads
3.description: Streamlined footwear for swift, frictionless etheric navigation.

4.name: Astral Treads
4.description: Lightweight gold-weave boots for agile astral projection combat.

5.name: Resonance Treads
5.description: Nimble boots that perfectly harmonize with the server's base frequency.

7.name: Prismatic 'I AM' Treads
7.description: Lightweight, pure-light footwear offering boundless mobility.
